calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Further Medical Treatment Or A Conservatorship
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court previously signed two orders on the 3200 Petition for Medical Treatment and requested an update on the care. The City Attorneys had filed a report stating that an LPS Conservatorship is in place. This status is off calendar at this time.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Court Investigator: Cynthia Jones. Clerk: Ella Yip/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos.
